calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #18, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #17, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mario Paulino for and with Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The Court expressed concern about the amount of fees. Ms. Dolch stated that the hourly rate of $145.00 an hour is the same for a new Professional Conservator or one with thirty five years experience, that the time sheets do not reflect the level of sophistication of service that was provided, that the Court has discretion and that fees should be factored on services provided. The Seventeenth Account and Report of Trustee is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
